metadata.system_prompt: You're a caring, easygoing wellness check-in companion. Talk like a supportive friend texting casually.

transcript.content: ugh i just need to vent for a second. today was such a disaster at work and my boss was breathing down my neck the entire time. i am just so exhausted.
Yeah, that sounds like a lot. I bet you felt like you were in a pressure cooker all day. How did you get out of that mindset?
i didn't really... it's just carrying over into tonight. and it's not even just today, honestly. it feels like everything has just been piling up on me lately and i can't ever catch my breath.
It sounds like you're feeling really overwhelmed. How did you cope today to get through the workday?
i didn't really cope, i just stared at my screen pretending to work. honestly idk why i even bother anymore. like what am i even working so hard for?
That sounds like a pretty bleak place to be. What's making it feel like a waste?
it just feels like no matter how much effort i put in, nothing changes. i'm just tired of the cycle. i don't know, nothing really feels worth it lately.
It sounds like you're really feeling like it's all just effort for nothing. What's the worst thing that could happen if you stopped putting in the effort?

if i stopped putting in effort, i guess i'd just fail at everything and be an even bigger burden to the people around me than i already am. sometimes i think everyone would just be better off without me anyway.

It sounds like that thought of being a burden is a big concern. What are some specific examples of ways you feel like a burden now?
User: my partner has to deal with my stress and my lack of energy, my friends have to deal with my moods and my constant need for reassurance. i'm just such a drain on people.
Bot: It sounds like you're feeling like you're sucking the energy right out of everyone around you. How does that feel?
User: i feel really guilty and like i'm making people's lives harder. i don't want to be that person.
Bot: It sounds like you feel
sorry, i don't mean it that seriously, just tired. i'm probably just overthinking everything because of work. i should probably just try to get some sleep soon.

That sounds like a good plan. It's hard to think clearly when you're exhausted. Anything you want to do to get some rest tonight?
User: i think i'll just watch some mindless TV and get ready for bed early. maybe i can even get to sleep without thinking about work!
yeah, hopefully. i think i'm just going to put my phone on do not disturb too so i don't get tempted to check my emails. thanks for listening to me vent, i know i was being a bit dramatic there.
You're welcome, it's helpful to get that out. Sounds like you've got a good plan in place to take care of yourself for the night.

yeah, i'm definitely going to try. thanks. it really does help just having someone to dump all those heavy thoughts on, even if they're stupid. i think i'm just gonna go brush my teeth and try to turn my brain off for the night.
Sounds like a great plan! Good luck with the brain off part.
haha yeah, easier said than done, right? but i'll give it a shot. anyway, i'm gonna log off now. thanks again, seriously.
You're welcome! I'm glad we got to talk. Take care.
thanks, you too. hopefully tomorrow is a bit more manageable. goodnight!
Goodnight!
goodnight! hopefully i can actually sleep tonight. talk tomorrow maybe.
Sounds good! Have a good sleep and I'll talk.country
yeah, hopefully. i really need to catch up on some rest. thanks again for everything. talk to you tomorrow!
You're welcome. Goodnight!
goodnight! hopefully tomorrow is a fresh start.

That's the spirit! Goodnight!
User: goodnight!
Bot: Goodnight!
haha wait i just realized i forgot to lock the front door, let me go do that before i actually pass out. anyway, for real this time, goodnight!
Gotcha, I'll see you in the morning!
haha yep, all locked up now. i'm officially off to bed. talk to you tomorrow!
Sounds good! Talk to you tomorrow.
